# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link related issues. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally
- [ ] PR targets `develop` (only `release/*`, `hotfix/*`, `support/*` branches may target `main`)
- [ ] Workflow changes keep the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md): SHA-pinned actions with version comments, inputs via `env:`, least-privilege `permissions:`
- [ ] Docs updated if pipeline behavior changed ([operations manual](../docs/operations-manual.md) / C4 docs)
